name: NVE CORP /NEW/
summary: NVE Corporation (NVEC) develops and sells spintronic products, which use electron spin rather than electron charge to acquire, store, and transmit information. The company manufactures spintronic components including magnetoresistance sensors and couplers. NVE also licenses its spintronic technology to other companies. Its products serve industrial, medical, and other markets requiring high-performance sensing and isolation solutions.
